---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
format:
  html:
    include-after-body: ../includes/pub-scroll.html
---

{{< include /includes/_profile-header.qmd >}}

::: {.cv-download}
[Download CV (PDF)](Chansu_Han_CV.pdf){.btn-pdf target="_blank"}
:::

```{=html}
<div class="cv-pdf-embed">
<iframe src="Chansu_Han_CV.pdf#view=FitH&navpanes=0" title="Curriculum Vitae PDF"></iframe>
</div>
```

{{< include _content-vita.qmd >}}

{{< include _content.qmd >}}

{{< include _content-ja.qmd >}}
